# AC-04: AI Model Governance & Version Control

**Track:** AI Controls (`AC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

For changes involving AI components: register all AI models (including GPAI/foundation models, open-source models, custom-trained models) in a model registry capturing: model identifier and version, provider, training data provenance and lineage, known limitations and failure modes, bias test results, performance benchmarks, licence terms, and intended use constraints. Enforce model version pinning in all deployment configurations. Require documented approval for any model version upgrade, downgrade, or provider change. Validate model version at deploy time (Stage 5) and monitor for model provider version changes (Stage 6).

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 2 | System Design | Conditional | *AC-04 applies at design time (model registry creation), deployment time (version validation), and maintenance time (drift detection). Applicable only when change involves AI models.*
| 5 | Deployment & Release | Conditional | *At deployment: verify that the deployed model version matches the registered and tested version from design.*
| 6 | Observability & Maintenance | Conditional | *Monitor for model provider version changes (e.g., when using API-based models like OpenAI GPT) and detect model performance drift.*

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent creates registry, human reviews and approves |
| **Agent does** | Create model registry entry for each AI model. Populate: model ID, version, provider, training data description, performance metrics, bias test results, known limitations. For model updates: propose new version with change rationale. Track model dependency in deployment configuration. |
| **Human does** | Review model registry entry. Validate training data provenance and licensing. Approve model version for use. For model updates: approve change or request rollback. Monitor for performance degradation. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| AI model specification | AC-03 | Design-time documentation of selected AI models and their intended use |
| Model provider documentation | Model cards, training data descriptions, licence terms |  |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Model Registry Entry | evidence | Comprehensive metadata for each AI model: ID, version, provider, training data provenance, performance benchmarks, bias test results, licence, intended use, limitations, and dependencies. | 7 years (EU AI Act Art. 12 record-keeping) |
| Model Version Pin (deployment configuration) | artefact | Explicit version pinning in deployment manifests (e.g., model_version: gpt-4-0613, rather than latest) | Duration of deployment |
| Model Update Approval Decision | decision | For each model version change: approval, rationale, date, and rollback plan if degradation is detected | 7 years |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_model_change |
| **SLA** | 120 min |
| **Tooling** | MLflow Model Registry, Hugging Face Model Hub, Amazon SageMaker Model Registry, Weights & Biases, Custom model versioning system |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | AI Governance Lead |

If model registry is incomplete or version pinning is not enforced, escalate to AI Governance Lead. Cannot deploy without confirmed model version.

## Dependencies

- `AC-03`
- `AC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 28 | Third-party ICT risk management applies to AI model providers |
| EU AI Act | Art. 11 & Annex IV | Technical documentation must include "description of changes made to the system throughout its lifecycle"; model version tracking enables this |
| EU AI Act | Art. 72 | Post-market monitoring must track performance relative to the deployed model version; presupposes version tracking |
| EU AI Act | Arts. 51-56 | GPAI model documentation requirements (model card, training data, limitations); stored in model registry |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** AI Governance, ML Ops · **Owner role:** ML Ops Lead
